notes: WildChat: 1M ChatGPT Interaction Logs in the Wild (Conover et al., arXiv:2405.01470). 838K non-toxic conversations with geographic and behavioral metadata. Includes 204K+ unique contributors. Columns: conversation_id, model (gpt-3.5-turbo or gpt-4), timestamp, conversation (nested: role, content, language, redacted, toxic), language, toxicity/moderation flags, state (U.S.), country, hashed_ip. NOTE: Paper explicitly prioritizes privacy—NO traditional persona demographics (age, gender, education, occupation) are collected. Dimensions are geographic (state, country) and technical/behavioral only.
